name: Jira Client
description: Read and write Jira (Atlassian Cloud or Server / Data Center) via the REST API. Exposes JQL search, get/create/update/delete on issues and projects, transitions, comments, attachments, user lookup, and a raw escape hatch. Handles Cloud (basic auth with email + API token, REST v3, ADF, nextPageToken pagination) vs Server/DC (bearer Personal Access Token, REST v2, plain-text bodies, startAt pagination) automatically. The agent never sees the API token.

input.arguments: a subcommand and its arguments (e.g., search "project = PROJ AND status = Open" --limit 50 --output issues.jsonl --format jsonl)

output.layout: JSON to stdout by default; --output writes to a file in the chosen --format
